title: Public Status Page
description: Configure the public status page's stats window, chart bucket size, and which groups/models should be exposed.

form.windowHoursDesc: Window length used to compute TTFB and availability, and the total span the chart covers. Default: 24 hours.
form.aggregationIntervalMinutesDesc: Length of each bucket on the chart timeline; controls chart granularity. Choose 5 / 15 / 30 / 60 minutes.
form.aggregationIntervalMinutesInvalid: Public status aggregation interval must be one of 5, 15, 30, or 60 minutes.
form.slugTooltip: URL identifier for this group's dedicated status page. Leave empty to auto-generate from the public display name. Lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens only.
form.duplicateSlug: Slug {slug} is used by multiple public groups. Please make each group slug unique before saving.
form.sortOrderTooltip: Display order on the public status page. Lower values appear first (same convention as provider priority). Equal values fall back to group name.
form.descriptionTooLong: Public status configuration exceeds the 16 KB UTF-8 limit of provider_groups.description.
form.projectionPublishFailed: Public status Redis projection publish failed.
form.groupsDesc: Only groups with the toggle enabled and at least one selected public model will activate public status aggregation.
form.modelsDesc: Pick the exact models to expose publicly. You can override the provider type per model when heuristics are ambiguous.
form.providerOverrideDesc: Use an explicit provider type only when the model name is ambiguous.
form.modelIdsPlaceholder: One model ID per line, e.g. gpt-4.1
form.modelIdsDesc: Only enter model IDs to expose. The public page resolves display name and icon from the local price table.
form.helper: The feature is off by default. Background aggregation starts only when at least one group has a non-empty public model list.
form.saveFailed: Failed to save public status settings
form.backgroundRefreshPending: Settings saved, but the public status page may stay stale until the background refresh succeeds.

public.staleDetail: The latest completed snapshot is still shown while a refresh is pending.
public.emptyDescription: We are preparing the first public snapshot for this page.

tooltip.inferredFromNeighbors: No requests in this window — inferred from neighbors

public.emptyByFilter: No groups or models match your filter
